overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through an abandoned urban plaza with a colorful derelict building, descending through a concrete tunnel, and emerging onto a post-apocalyptic beach boardwalk. The character continues along the sandy shore past scattered NPCs, abandoned cars, and a rusted amusement park with roller coaster and Ferris wheel visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban plaza with colorful derelict apartment building

events.description: character turns left toward the tunnel entrance leading to the beach

agents.ego_description: walking through the deserted plaza past concrete barriers and construction debris toward the beach access tunnel

entered.detail: multi-story concrete building with brightly colored balconies in yellow, green, blue, and purple
tall palm trees scattered throughout the plaza area
large square concrete barrier blocks arranged in the plaza
blue and red barrels and wooden pallets stacked near the building

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit abandoned urban plaza dominated by a colorful derelict building with vibrant balcony railings. Concrete blocks and construction debris litter the ground as the character approaches a tunnel entrance leading down to the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete pedestrian underpass with descending stairs

events.description: character enters the dark concrete tunnel from the bright plaza above
emerging from the tunnel into bright sunlight revealing the beach ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down the concrete stairs through the dimly lit tunnel toward the beach exit

entered.detail: raw concrete walls and ceiling of the pedestrian underpass with exposed beams
white metal handrails lining both sides of the staircase
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The character descends through a dimly lit concrete tunnel with graffiti-covered walls and metal stair railings. The lighting shifts dramatically as the character approaches the tunnel exit, revealing the bright beach and ocean ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned beach boardwalk with amusement park ruins

events.description: exits tunnel onto the sandy beach boardwalk with amusement park visible
character passes an NPC walking in the opposite direction on the boardwalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden boardwalk toward the abandoned amusement park rides

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a jacket and shorts walking along the boardwalk

entered.detail: large rusted roller coaster structure with red tracks dominating the skyline
tall white Ferris wheel behind the roller coaster
derelict vehicles including a yellow car and silver car partially buried in sand
calm blue ocean water visible beyond the beach
weathered wooden planks forming the beach walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the character steps onto a sun-bleached wooden boardwalk along a sandy beach. The rusted skeleton of a roller coaster and Ferris wheel rise in the background while abandoned cars sit half-buried in the sand. A lone pedestrian walks past as the character continues along the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach path with makeshift shelters and seawall

events.description: encountering a group of three NPCs walking along the beach path
passing the elevated lifeguard tower on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sandy beach path passing various beachgoers and structures

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking toward the camera along the sandy path

entered.detail: elevated wooden lifeguard station with red door and ramp access
ramshackle huts and tarps set up on the beach
long concrete wall running parallel to the beach with palm trees atop

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sandy beach path away from the amusement park, passing a weathered lifeguard tower and makeshift beach shelters. Several NPCs walk along the path, and the concrete seawall runs parallel to the shore on the left while the ocean stretches to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit urban ruin through a dark subterranean passage and out onto a desolate coastal boardwalk. It begins in an abandoned plaza littered with construction debris, moving past a colorful derelict building toward a descending tunnel entrance. As the character enters the tunnel, the environment shifts to a dimly lit concrete corridor with graffiti-covered walls before the light dramatically intensifies at the exit. The scene then opens onto a sun-bleached wooden boardwalk where the rusted skeletons of a roller coaster and Ferris wheel loom over half-buried cars and a sandy shore. Finally, the camera follows the character along a beach path past a weathered lifeguard tower and makeshift shelters, moving parallel to a concrete seawall as the ocean stretches out to the right.
